---
applyTo: "**/*.{ts,tsx}"
description: "TypeScript development standards for Next.js frontend"
---
# TypeScript coding standards

Apply the repository-wide guidance from `../copilot-instructions.md` to frontend code.

## General Guidelines
- Use `strict` TypeScript settings where practical.
- Prefer explicit types for public interfaces and component props.
- Keep components small and focused; lift state when necessary.
